title: North Jersey Federal Credit Union Selects Symitar for New Technology Strategy
text: Employee usability, efficiencies and openness drive credit union's decision MONETT, Mo. , April 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ:JKHY) announced today that North Jersey Federal Credit Union (NJFCU) selected Symitar to host its core in the Jack Henry private cloud and help enable its new technology strategy.

title: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES TO PROVIDE WEBCAST OF THIRD QUARTER FISCAL YEAR 2022 EARNINGS CALL
text: MONETT, Mo., April 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that it will host a live Webcast of its third quarter fiscal year 2022 earnings conference call on May 4, 2022.

title: Old Second National Bank Expands Collaboration with Jack Henry
text: Expanded relationship will deliver greater efficiencies, new digital capabilities, and stronger connections MONETT, Mo. , April 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Old Second National Bank has expanded its collaboration with Jack Henry to support the bank's digital and growth strategy.

title: BOX to Aid Teams With Secure Collaboration Via Box Canvas
text: BOX unveils a virtual whiteboarding and visual collaboration experience solution named Box Canvas to offer a secure collaboration platform to hybrid teams.

title: Top 5 High-Flying Nasdaq Stocks Amid Index's YTD Meltdown
text: We have narrowed our search to five Nasdaq listed stocks that have witnessed double-digit rally year to date. These are: VRTX, SPLK, HSIC, CHKP and JKHY.

title: Lea County State Bank Modernizes Technology Infrastructure with Jack Henry
text: Competitive digital solutions, new features are welcomed by customers and employees alike MONETT, Mo. , April 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Lea County State Bank selected Jack Henry to upgrade its technology platform with open, flexible and user-centric digital solutions.

title: Jack Henry Publishes Annual Sustainability Report
text: Report details progress to meet company's 2021 environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals MONETT, Mo., April 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today the publication of its 2022 Sustainability Report that details the company's progress in advancing its environmental, social, and governance (ESG) priorities.
